message.content:

  "page_type": "other",
  "summary": "This is the cover page of an installation and operation manual for a TICA brand modular air-cooled chiller (heat pump). The page displays the manual title in English and Chinese, the equipment type, and the manufacturer's logo.",

    {"type": "text", "label": "INSTALLATION & OPERATION MANUAL"},

    {"type": "text", "label": "模块化风冷式冷（热）水机组-D"},
    {"type": "logo", "label": "TICA 天加中央空调"},
    {"type": "text", "label": "制冷百家网: www.zh lengbj.cn"}
  ],
  "visual_relationships": [],
  "useful_for_knowledge_types": ["manual_identification", "equipment_model"],
  "ocr_text_if_useful": "INSTALLATION & OPERATION MANUAL\n安装操作手册\nMODULAR AIR-COOLED CHILLER (HEAT PUMP)\n模块化风冷式冷（热）水机组-D\nTICA 天加中央空调\n制冷百家网: www.zh lengbj.cn",
  "uncertainty_notes": "The specific model number 'D' is visible in the Chinese text but its full context is not provided on this cover page. The watermark at the bottom is from a third-party website.",
